title: aster alpinus subsp. breyninus
intro: Aster alpinus subsp. breyninus, also known as Alpine Aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Aster include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing relief from anxiety and stress, among others. Alpine Aster can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
